upright.keyMeanings: New beginnings, freedom, adventure, potential, purity, optimism
upright.general: The Fool card symbolizes new beginnings and infinite potential. He steps into the unknown without fear, representing pure faith and optimism. It signifies breaking free from conventions, exploring freely, following intuition, and being ready to embrace new experiences.
upright.love: In love, The Fool card indicates the start of a new relationship or a fresh leap in an existing one. It suggests being ready to fall in love or advance a relationship without fear of the unknown. This shows a tendency to approach a partner with a pure and open heart, seeking joyful and spontaneous encounters.
upright.career: In career and finance, The Fool card signifies new job opportunities, starting a business, or innovative changes in an existing workplace. It indicates that taking risks and boldly attempting new challenges can lead to great achievements. It's a time to dive into projects that are still uncertain but have great potential, or to freely express creative ideas.
upright.health: In health, The Fool card indicates starting new health habits or trying new treatments, breaking away from conventional methods. It's advisable to listen to your body and approach health management with an open mind. Sometimes, you might encounter opportunities to improve your health in unexpected ways.
upright.spirituality: Spiritually, The Fool card symbolizes pure faith and the beginning of a spiritual journey. It means being ready to surrender to the flow of the universe, follow inner wisdom, and explore the unknown spiritual world. True enlightenment can be achieved when you let go of everything and move forward solely with intuition and faith.

reversed.keyMeanings: Recklessness, indecision, risk aversion, instability, immaturity, escapism
reversed.general: The reversed Fool card warns against reckless behavior or, conversely, excessive risk aversion. Problems may arise from rushing into things unprepared or taking unnecessary risks. It can also indicate indecision, hesitating to start something new due to fear, or missing opportunities.
reversed.love: In love, the reversed Fool card suggests irresponsibility or hasty decisions in a relationship. You might rush into love without enough thought, or conversely, avoid developing the relationship due to fear. Immaturity or a refusal to face reality can lead to instability in the relationship.
reversed.career: In career and finance, the reversed Fool card warns of losses due to reckless investments or hasty business decisions. You might start new ventures without a plan or waste time clinging to unrealistic ideas. It can also indicate missing opportunities due to fear of change, or wandering without direction.
reversed.health: In health, the reversed Fool card indicates indifference to health management or reckless attempts. You might blindly trust unproven treatments or insist on unhealthy habits. Neglecting basic health care or avoiding stress can worsen problems.
reversed.spirituality: Spiritually, the reversed Fool card means you might wander off the spiritual path or fall into false beliefs. You might ignore your inner voice or tend to use spirituality as a means of escapism. There's a risk of being caught up in temporary satisfaction or illusions rather than true enlightenment.

upright.keyMeanings: Beginnings, potential, ability, willpower, action, focus
upright.general: The Magician card symbolizes new beginnings and infinite potential. You possess all the necessary tools and can manifest your goals into reality through strong willpower and focus. Now is the time to translate ideas into concrete actions and actively seize opportunities.
upright.love: It signifies the beginning of a new relationship or being ready to move to a new stage in an existing one. You can effectively express your charm and develop the relationship further through honest and proactive communication. It's time to clearly express your desires and actively lead the relationship.
upright.career: It foretells the start of a new project, business, or career transition. You have ample ability to bring creative ideas into reality and can successfully utilize necessary skills and talents. With excellent problem-solving skills and focus, you will overcome any difficulties and achieve success.
upright.health: This is an excellent time to start a new health management plan. Through a positive mindset and willpower, you will regain vitality, and physical and mental healing will be promoted. Setting clear health goals and consistently practicing them will yield good results.
upright.spirituality: This is an opportune time to develop and utilize your inner spiritual abilities and intuition. You will connect deeply with cosmic energy and realize your conscious creative power. Through meditation and self-reflection, you can listen to your inner voice and achieve spiritual growth.

reversed.keyMeanings: Immaturity, deception, hesitation, wasted talent, lack of focus, fraud
reversed.general: The reversed Magician indicates that talent or potential is not being properly utilized. There might be a lack of willpower or energy being used in the wrong direction, leading to missed or delayed important opportunities. Sometimes, it also warns of fraud, manipulation, or unethical behavior.
reversed.love: It can indicate dishonesty in a relationship, lack of communication, or attempts to deceive or manipulate the other person. Hesitation or apathy towards relationship development can lead to stagnation or misalignment. There is a need to approach the relationship with a sincere heart.
reversed.career: You might not be utilizing your abilities properly or could face difficulties in materializing ideas. There could be project delays, lack of planning, or temptation to gain profit through unethical means. Be careful not to miss important opportunities due to a lack of focus.
reversed.health: Lethargy and laziness might lead to neglecting health management or blindly trusting incorrect health information. Treatment might be delayed, or health goals lost, leading to a decrease in overall vitality. It's important to seek professional advice and actively address health issues.
reversed.spirituality: You might misuse your spiritual abilities or tend to ignore intuition and avoid reality. It's easy to fall into vain spiritual pursuits or self-deception, moving away from true spiritual growth. You need to face your inner truth and adopt a balanced perspective.

upright.keyMeanings: Intuition, subconscious, mystery, wisdom, secrets, inner voice, spiritual insight
upright.general: The High Priestess brings a message to follow your inner wisdom and intuition. She symbolizes hidden secrets or knowledge that are not outwardly revealed, indicating the need for patience and the exploration of truth in silence. It is a time to find answers through contemplation and meditation rather than hasty judgments, and to trust the spiritual power and insight deeply slumbering within you.
upright.love: In relationships, it signifies deep understanding and intuitive connection. You may look into your partner's inner self and form a deep bond, but sometimes you might maintain a mysterious and quiet demeanor rather than expressing emotions directly. It can also indicate a secret romance or emotional depths yet to be revealed.
upright.career: It is advantageous to use intuition to solve problems or gain new ideas. It aligns well with professions that utilize inner wisdom, such as research, counseling, and psychology. This is a time for careful planning and information gathering rather than hasty actions. Hidden information or unconscious insights can be the key to success.
upright.health: It is important to listen to your inner voice and detect your body's signals. Focus on balancing your mind and body through mental health, stress management, and meditation. You may gain intuitive insights into hidden health issues or develop an interest in complementary and alternative medicine.
upright.spirituality: It symbolizes spiritual growth and deep inner exploration. This is a time when effort is needed to connect with the subconscious and understand the mysteries of the universe through meditation, dream interpretation, and spiritual practices. Your interest in mysticism or occult knowledge will deepen, and you will gain true enlightenment in your inner sanctuary.

reversed.keyMeanings: Ignoring intuition, superficial knowledge, revelation of secrets, excessive rationality, escapism, emotional repression
reversed.general: It indicates a tendency to ignore your inner voice or distrust intuition. Important information or truths may be hidden or distorted, and relying solely on superficial facts can lead to problems. Sometimes, hidden secrets may be revealed, or you might experience emotional confusion.
reversed.love: In relationships, you may experience a lack of communication or emotional disconnection. Hiding your true feelings or failing to understand your partner's emotions can lead to misunderstandings. A secret relationship might end disastrously, or you might struggle with emotional expression. An overly rational approach can weaken emotional connection.
reversed.career: You may miss important information or face difficulties due to poor judgment. Ignoring intuition and relying solely on realistic data can lead to missed opportunities or wrong decisions. There's a risk of work-related secrets being leaked or getting involved in issues like fraud or betrayal, so caution is advised.
reversed.health: Health problems due to inner conflicts such as mental confusion, anxiety, or depression may arise. Ignoring your body's signals or blindly trusting incorrect health information can worsen symptoms, so caution is needed. Avoid excessive stress or escapist behaviors.
reversed.spirituality: It indicates being lost on your spiritual path or unable to hear your inner voice. You might have a rejection of spiritual knowledge, a superficial approach, or be misled by false spiritual teachings. Inner turmoil and imbalance can hinder true spiritual growth, and you should be wary of an attitude that avoids the truth.

upright.keyMeanings: Abundance, fertility, creativity, beauty, motherhood, prosperity
upright.general: The Empress card symbolizes abundance, fertility, connection with nature, and the feminine archetype. It signifies the birth of new life or projects, the manifestation of creative energy, and growth achieved in stability and comfort. It shows a life lived in harmony with the laws of nature, enjoying material and spiritual abundance.
upright.love: In love, it signifies deep love, maternal care, and the richness of a relationship. It can indicate progression to new stages like marriage or pregnancy, and suggests that the relationship strengthens through deep understanding and unconditional love. Attraction and sensuality are emphasized, leading to a warm and stable relationship.
upright.career: In career and finances, it indicates the success of creative projects, business prosperity, and a plentiful financial state. You can particularly excel in nurturing fields such as art, design, childcare, and agriculture. Investments may bear fruit, or unexpected income may arise. It symbolizes stable income and a comfortable work environment.
upright.health: In terms of health, it indicates vitality, life force, and good overall health. It can particularly signify good news related to pregnancy and childbirth. Managing health through nature-friendly methods or focusing on self-care is highly beneficial. Maintaining quick recovery and healthy eating habits is important.
upright.spirituality: Spiritually, it signifies a deep connection with nature and awakening inner feminine wisdom and intuition. Loving and caring for yourself, and recognizing the beauty and sacredness of life are important. You can achieve spiritual growth by meditating in nature or expressing your inner creativity through artistic activities.

reversed.keyMeanings: Infertility, laziness, overspending, dependency, lack of creativity, indifference
reversed.general: The reversed Empress card indicates creative stagnation, infertility, obsession with material things, or indifference. You might be dependent or prone to excessive spending, or fail to utilize your abundance properly and fall into laziness. It also warns against escapism, instability, and a neglectful attitude towards oneself.
reversed.love: In love, it signifies stagnation in the relationship, jealousy, excessive attachment, or coldness. There might be difficulties with pregnancy or marriage. You could become overly dependent on your partner or, conversely, indifferent. It indicates a loss of self-worth, lack of attraction, or insufficient genuine connection with your lover.
reversed.career: In career and finances, it symbolizes a lack of creative ideas, business stagnation, and financial difficulties. Laziness can lead to decreased work performance, or unnecessary expenses can cause financial instability. Loss of passion for work or indifference to the surrounding environment can hinder growth.
reversed.health: In terms of health, it can indicate infertility, female reproductive issues, obesity, or lethargy. Neglecting self-care or failing to maintain healthy lifestyle habits can lead to problems. Stress or mental fatigue can adversely affect physical health, so active self-care is necessary.
reversed.spirituality: Spiritually, it signifies disconnection from nature, ignoring your inner voice, and being overly engrossed in material things. You might neglect spiritual growth and focus solely on worldly desires, ignoring intuition and relying only on external values. Effort is needed to regain inner balance.

upright.keyMeanings: Authority, Leadership, Control, Stability, Paternity, Structure, Order
upright.general: The Emperor card symbolizes strong leadership, structure, control, and stability. It signifies the ability and responsibility to establish order and discipline in the real world, sometimes representing a father figure or an authoritative person. This card shows a firm will to plan, execute, and achieve goals. It appears when success is achieved through a systematic approach and a solid foundation.
upright.love: In relationships, stability and commitment are highly valued, and one may exhibit a protective and responsible attitude. There is an effort to provide trust and security to a spouse or partner, aiming to build a strong foundation for the relationship. One may have conservative views on romance and seek relationships based on firm trust.
upright.career: Professionally, there is a high likelihood of exercising strong leadership or succeeding in a systematic and organized environment. It is suitable for careers involving authority and responsibility, such as entrepreneurs, managers, or civil servants, and one can build a stable and solid financial foundation. Consistent effort and planned execution towards goals will lead to significant achievements.
upright.health: There is a tendency to manage health through regular lifestyle habits and exercise. Attention should be paid to health related to the structural stability of the body, such as bones, joints, and blood pressure, and stress management and a balanced diet are important. Overall, there is an effort to maintain strong physical stamina and a firm will in health management.
upright.spirituality: There is a tendency to focus on the material world and practical problem-solving, prioritizing practical values and order over abstract spiritual exploration. One may have their own philosophy or beliefs but is more interested in applying them to real life to find stability. Peace is sought through inner order and discipline.

reversed.keyMeanings: Dictatorship, Loss of Control, Incompetence, Immaturity, Male Issues, Inflexibility
reversed.general: The reversed Emperor card indicates abuse of authority, loss of control, or incompetence and immaturity. One may be stubborn and inflexible, or fail to use their authority properly, causing chaos. It sometimes means avoiding responsibilities or experiencing conflicts with others due to excessive control, and it represents a breakdown of systems or a disorderly situation.
reversed.love: In relationships, conflicts may arise due to an authoritarian and dogmatic attitude, or conversely, trust may be lost due to irresponsible behavior. Excessive interference or control can stifle a partner, or avoiding important decisions can destabilize the relationship. It can sometimes hint at parental relationship issues or conflicts with male figures.
reversed.career: Professionally, problems may arise due to arbitrary decisions, or a lack of leadership may prevent leading team members effectively. Resistance to rules or systems, inefficient management, or an irresponsible attitude can lead to financial losses or career stagnation. Excessive bureaucracy or rigidity can hinder growth.
reversed.health: There may be indifference to health issues or an overly stubborn attitude towards health management. Caution is advised for stress-related illnesses, blood pressure problems, or bone-related conditions. Irregular lifestyle habits or an irresponsible attitude towards health can lead to a general deterioration of health.
reversed.spirituality: It indicates fixed ideas or narrow-minded thinking that hinder spiritual growth. One may cling only to material things or try to impose their beliefs on others. There may be a tendency to blindly follow external rules or authority rather than listening to one's inner voice, or an evasive attitude towards spiritual matters.

upright.keyMeanings: Tradition, Education, Wisdom, Spiritual Guidance, Advice, Religion, Beliefs
upright.general: The Hierophant card symbolizes traditional wisdom, institutionalized beliefs, and spiritual teachings. It indicates the need to receive guidance from a respected teacher or mentor, or to follow existing order and discipline. It suggests a period of learning and growth on a stable and firm foundation, emphasizing the importance of adhering to community values and moral guidelines.
upright.love: One seeks stable and traditional relationships. It can signify institutional commitments like marriage or engagement, leading to a relationship built on deep trust and mutual respect for values and beliefs. Advice from elders or arranged introductions can be positive, and there is a tendency to prioritize stability and harmony in the relationship.
upright.career: It indicates a stable career, success in traditional fields, or a role in educational or religious institutions. Following a mentor's advice and adhering to rules and procedures are important. It is a time to strengthen expertise through certification or acquiring specialized knowledge, and activities in reputable institutions may be prominent.
upright.health: It is advisable to follow traditional treatments or expert advice. Mental stability and balance are important, and managing health through regular lifestyle habits and meditation is necessary. It may also connect to spiritual healing, and seeking advice from a trustworthy medical institution or professional is wise.
upright.spirituality: It signifies deep spiritual exploration, the establishment of religious beliefs, or an encounter with a spiritual teacher. One may find greater meaning by participating in a spiritual community or organization. It is a process of discovering inner values and applying them to daily life, and significant enlightenment can be gained from traditional spiritual teachings.

reversed.keyMeanings: Unconventionality, Rebellion, Fixed Ideas, Confinement, Pursuit of Freedom, Dogmatism, Distrust
reversed.general: The reversed Hierophant card indicates rebellion against traditional customs or authority, or being trapped by fixed ideas. It means questioning existing rules or institutions and trying to find one's own way, or grappling with a moral dilemma. It sometimes warns against hypocrisy or a dogmatic attitude, and there is a risk of being led astray by bad advice.
reversed.love: It indicates a rejection of traditional relationships or institutions, or dissatisfaction with formal relationships. One may feel confined in a relationship or experience conflicts due to differences in values. There may be a desire to pursue unconventional relationships or break free from existing frameworks, and a tendency to resist external interference or fixed ideas.
reversed.career: It indicates dissatisfaction with an existing job or field, or a desire to break free from fixed ideas and try something new. One may rebel against authoritarian superiors or unreasonable rules, and may seek an independent path. Following bad advice or disregarding principles can lead to problems, and personal freedom may be prioritized over career stability.
reversed.health: It may indicate distrust or rejection of traditional treatments. One might seek new alternative therapies or insist on their own health management methods. Mental instability or misguided beliefs can lead to health problems, and ignoring expert advice could worsen the situation.
reversed.spirituality: It indicates skepticism towards existing religions or spiritual teachings, or a pursuit of spiritual freedom. One may fall into dogmatic spiritual exploration or be misled by false gurus or cults. It could be a period of wandering to find one's own spiritual path, and there is a risk of focusing on external appearances rather than true spiritual enlightenment.

upright.keyMeanings: Choice, harmony, love, relationships, alignment of values, commitment
upright.general: The Lovers card upright symbolizes decisions made at important crossroads in life and the harmony that follows as a result. It signifies significant choices that may arise in various areas of life, such as love, friendship, or career, indicating that positive outcomes can be achieved when decisions align with one's values and beliefs. Through responsible choices, one has the opportunity to start new relationships or further develop existing ones.
upright.love: In love readings, The Lovers card foretells the beginning of true love, deep bonds, and the development of stable relationships. It can symbolize important commitments like marriage or engagement, and signifies a relationship that grows through mutual respect and understanding of each other's values. If single, you can expect a fated encounter; if in a couple, it's a time for the relationship to deepen and strengthen.
upright.career: In career readings, it indicates the formation of important partnerships, successful collaborations, or significant decisions regarding professional goals. You might choose a career that aligns with your values, or an important contract could be finalized. There are many opportunities to lead projects to success by creating synergy within harmonious relationships with colleagues.
upright.health: In terms of health, it signifies a balanced state of body and mind, and the stability derived from relationships can positively impact health. While sometimes important medical decisions may need to be made, it suggests that health can be restored or maintained through careful choices. It can also relate to hormonal balance or reproductive health.
upright.spirituality: Spiritually, it indicates a time to establish one's deeply held values and beliefs and to make important choices on one's spiritual path. You may meet a soulmate or mentor, and experience discovering your true self and growing through inner harmony. You will seek alignment with spiritual teachings.

reversed.keyMeanings: Conflict, discord, wrong choice, indecision, misalignment, infidelity
reversed.general: The Lovers card reversed suggests wrong choices, discord in relationships, and inner conflict. It indicates indecisiveness when facing important decisions, or making choices that go against one's true values, leading to regret. Misunderstandings or distrust are likely to arise in relationships with others, and there's a risk of important commitments or plans going awry.
reversed.love: In love readings, The Lovers card reversed can warn of discord, conflict, distrust, or even separation in a relationship. You might be hurt by a love triangle or a poor romantic choice, and communication difficulties may arise due to conflicting values with your partner. If single, you might encounter an unsuitable partner or struggle with uncertainty about relationships.
reversed.career: In career readings, it can signify problems with collaboration, failed partnerships, or the termination of important contracts. Conflicts with colleagues may intensify, or you might incur losses due to poor investment decisions. You could be forced into work that doesn't align with your professional values, or miss opportunities due to indecisiveness when facing important decisions.
reversed.health: In terms of health, it indicates that health problems may arise due to stress or psychological pressure from relationships. Health could worsen due to poor lifestyle choices or incorrect treatment methods, and mental confusion might lead to physical symptoms. Specifically, hormonal imbalances or issues with the reproductive system may occur.
reversed.spirituality: Spiritually, it symbolizes inner confusion about values, misalignment of belief systems, or wandering on one's spiritual path. You might feel confused, unable to find your true spiritual purpose, or be at risk of falling into misleading spiritual teachings. It's a time of inner conflict, unable to achieve harmony, and you may feel disconnected from your true self.

upright.keyMeanings: Victory, determination, drive, control, success, focus, self-confidence
upright.general: The Chariot card symbolizes the drive to move towards a goal with strong will and determination. This manifests when one overcomes conflicts and adversities, exercises self-control, and achieves successful outcomes. Victory can be attained by balancing inner impulses and external circumstances, and by advancing with a firm sense of purpose.
upright.love: In relationships, The Chariot signifies a strong will towards a goal or the drive to develop the relationship. It can indicate dedicated efforts between lovers or the determination to advance the relationship to the next level. If single, it suggests actively seeking love or meeting a desired ideal partner.
upright.career: In career and finance, The Chariot foretells successful business ventures, project completion, or victory in competition. Firm goal setting and focused effort towards it will bring significant achievements and financial stability. It can also indicate promotions, seizing new opportunities, or making bold investment decisions.
upright.health: In terms of health, The Chariot symbolizes strong resilience, vitality, and determined efforts to improve health. It indicates successful achievement of health goals such as exercise or diet. It's a time of abundant mental and physical energy.
upright.spirituality: Spiritually, The Chariot signifies the process of controlling and harmoniously guiding various inner impulses and desires. It represents self-discipline, discovering inner strength, and a determined quest for spiritual growth. It symbolizes efforts to balance the material and spiritual worlds.

reversed.keyMeanings: Loss of control, loss of direction, failure, haste, frustration, indecision
reversed.general: The Chariot reversed indicates a loss of momentum towards a goal, or a loss of control due to internal or external obstacles. This can lead to reckless actions or aimless efforts, ultimately resulting in frustration and failure. Indecisiveness or lack of focus might also be contributing factors.
reversed.love: In relationships, The Chariot reversed warns of failed conflict management, power struggles within the relationship, or entering into a reckless relationship. It can signify one-sided actions or stagnation in relationship development. Self-assertion without consideration for each other can worsen the relationship.
reversed.career: In career and finance, The Chariot reversed suggests project delays, failure to achieve goals, or financial losses. You might face difficulties due to reckless investments or poor judgment, and could lose in workplace competition or lose direction. It's a time for careful review and reorganization.
reversed.health: In terms of health, The Chariot reversed indicates neglect of health management, injuries due to excessive dieting or exercise, or a loss of control over illness. Energy depletion may occur due to irregular lifestyle habits, so rest and rejuvenation are needed.
reversed.spirituality: Spiritually, The Chariot reversed signifies inner conflict and confusion, and the loss of spiritual goals. You might be unable to control your inner self, swept away by emotions or impulses. You could feel lost or confused, unable to find direction on your spiritual journey.

upright.keyMeanings: Courage, Inner Strength, Compassion, Self-Control, Patience, Influence
upright.general: The upright 'Strength' card symbolizes inner strength, courage, and the ability to tame animalistic instincts through gentle persuasion rather than force. It represents overcoming fears and doubts, controlling the lower self, and demonstrating resilience and determination. This card encourages facing challenges with compassion and calm confidence, indicating that true strength comes from within.
upright.love: In love, this card signifies a strong, compassionate, and understanding relationship built on mutual respect and empathy. It suggests resolving conflicts with patience and kindness, and the ability to gently guide and influence a partner. For singles, it indicates readiness to attract love and embrace deep connections through self-assurance and a calm, confident demeanor.
upright.career: In career and finance, the 'Strength' card indicates leadership qualities, the ability to motivate others, and successfully handling difficult projects or people through diplomacy and quiet confidence. It signifies overcoming obstacles with perseverance and inner resolve, achieving goals through strategic influence rather than aggression. Financially, it suggests steady management, wise handling, and resilience to withstand market fluctuations.
upright.health: In health, the 'Strength' card suggests recovery through mental fortitude and a holistic approach. It emphasizes the mind's power over the body, encouraging self-care, balanced habits, and a strong will for healing. It can also indicate managing chronic conditions with patience and resilience.
upright.spirituality: Spiritually, this card symbolizes the integration of the conscious and unconscious, and the harmony between primal instincts and higher wisdom. It signifies recognizing and utilizing one's spiritual power, cultivating compassion, and demonstrating inner peace and strength in the face of life's challenges. It encourages a journey towards self-mastery and inner enlightenment.

reversed.keyMeanings: Weakness, Self-Doubt, Loss of Control, Fear, Cowardice, Instability
reversed.general: The reversed 'Strength' card indicates a loss of inner power, self-doubt, and difficulty controlling primal impulses or fears. It suggests feeling overwhelmed or powerless due to aggression, succumbing to fear, or a lack of self-discipline. It urges a re-evaluation of where true strength lies and the need to reclaim personal authority.
reversed.love: In love, the reversed 'Strength' card can indicate relationship difficulties stemming from one partner trying to dominate, or a lack of mutual understanding and patience. It shows that insecurity, jealousy, or a failure in effective communication can lead to conflicts or emotional outbursts. For singles, it warns against attracting unhealthy relationships due to low self-esteem or an inability to set boundaries.
reversed.career: In career and finance, the reversed 'Strength' card can indicate a loss of influence, difficulty managing a team, or failing to complete projects due to a lack of confidence or assertiveness. It suggests feeling overwhelmed by responsibilities, succumbing to office politics, or making impulsive financial decisions driven by fear rather than wisdom.
reversed.health: In health, this card can signify a lack of will to recover, succumbing to unhealthy habits, or feeling powerless against illness. It may manifest as psychosomatic symptoms stemming from stress, anxiety, or repressed emotions. It urges a return to self-care and re-establishing mental resilience.
reversed.spirituality: Spiritually, this card indicates a disconnection from inner wisdom and the higher self, and succumbing to basic desires or worldly temptations. It can signify spiritual weakness, a lack of faith, or feeling overwhelmed by spiritual challenges, leading to cynicism or a retreat from inner work. It calls for re-establishing spiritual practices and reconnecting with one's core values.

upright.keyMeanings: Introspection, Reflection, Wisdom, Guidance, Solitude, Prudence
upright.general: The upright Hermit represents a period of withdrawing from the world to seek inner wisdom and engage in self-reflection. It is a crucial process of stepping away from external noise to explore one's true path and purpose. Solitude becomes an essential space for self-discovery and growth, not loneliness. Through a cautious and thoughtful attitude, you will look within yourself and gain important insights.
upright.love: It signifies deep reflection on relationships or a temporary break. You might be looking within yourself before starting a new romance, or your current relationship may require deeper understanding and space. There's a tendency to seek authentic and mature relationships rather than superficial encounters, aiming for independent and prudent love.
upright.career: It suggests delving deeply into specialized knowledge or taking on a mentor role. You might find yourself in a quiet environment, focusing on research, or seeking/offering wise counsel. By planning and executing carefully without rushing, you will achieve successful results.
upright.health: Sufficient rest for mind and body and listening to your inner voice are important. It's necessary to relieve stress and find balance through mental practices like meditation or yoga. Seeking professional advice or approaching health issues cautiously to find fundamental healing is recommended.
upright.spirituality: It symbolizes deep spiritual exploration and an inner journey. Efforts to find truth and gain enlightenment on your own, rather than relying on external religious teachings, are important. In solitude, you may encounter a spiritual teacher or achieve spiritual growth through experiences that deeply connect you with your soul.

reversed.keyMeanings: Isolation, Avoidance, Loneliness, Indifference, Rejection of Advice, Stubbornness
reversed.general: The reversed Hermit indicates a state of disconnection from the world due to excessive isolation or loneliness. You might be trapping yourself or rejecting others' advice, delaying problem-solving. This can lead to ignoring necessary help or behaviors akin to escapism, thus requiring you to reconnect and interact with the world again.
reversed.love: Due to excessive isolation, you may feel lonely or show a tendency to avoid relationships. You might be emotionally unavailable or put up walls against your partner. Time spent alone can turn into loneliness, making it difficult to start new relationships or causing estrangement in existing ones.
reversed.career: Rejecting others' advice or collaboration can lead to missed opportunities or difficulties in work progress. Trying to solve everything alone can lead to overload, or work can stagnate due to avoidance of responsibility and procrastination. Be careful, as stubborn obstinacy can cause you to miss growth opportunities and become isolated.
reversed.health: It indicates a tendency to ignore one's health problems or reject necessary medical advice. You might suffer in silence or fall into depression and anxiety, which can worsen both physical and mental health. It's important not to hesitate to seek professional help and actively address issues.
reversed.spirituality: It signifies avoiding spiritual growth or refusing to confront inner truths. You might ignore the advice of spiritual teachers or communities, or be trapped in dogmatic beliefs, failing to achieve true enlightenment. You may experience a spiritual stagnation or feel lost, so effort is needed to open your mind and embrace new perspectives.

upright.keyMeanings: Destiny, Turning Point, Luck, Opportunity, Cycles, Change, Karma
upright.general: Represents the unpredictable flow of life and fated changes. It suggests reaching a significant turning point where situations will move in a positive direction. Results of past actions may manifest, or new opportunities may arise, indicating a time when cosmic forces are guiding your life into a new phase.
upright.love: Positive changes are coming to your relationships. This could mean new encounters or progress in existing relationships. There's a high possibility of meeting a fated love, and an opportunity will arise to enter a new stage of a relationship.
upright.career: Professional luck and opportunities are coming your way. Positive changes such as promotions, new job offers, or business prosperity are expected. There's also a possibility of unexpected financial gains or successful investments.
upright.health: Signifies an improvement in health or recovery from a long-standing illness. It's a time to regain life's balance and vitality. A positive mindset will have a beneficial impact on your health.
upright.spirituality: A time for spiritual awakening or gaining significant insights. Your understanding of cosmic order and karma will deepen, providing an opportunity to accept your destiny and grow. You might meet a spiritual guide or encounter new spiritual practices.

reversed.keyMeanings: Bad Luck, Stagnation, Resistance, Delay, Instability, String of Misfortunes, Unexpected Adversity
reversed.general: Indicates a loss of control in life, a string of misfortunes, or resistance to change. Situations may not unfold as desired, or you might encounter unexpected obstacles. This could be due to external factors, but also due to an inner resistance to embracing change.
reversed.love: Misfortune may plague relationships, or unexpected difficulties may arise. Frequent arguments or misunderstandings can destabilize the relationship, and it may signify a breakup or a delay in reconciliation attempts. Fear of change might also cause stagnation in the relationship.
reversed.career: You may experience professional stagnation or bad luck. This could involve missed promotions, business difficulties, or unexpected financial losses. Rather than resisting change or blaming fate, you should calmly analyze the current situation and seek new strategies.
reversed.health: Signifies a deterioration in health or delayed recovery. You should be wary of unexpected illnesses or accidents, and stress or an unstable psychological state can negatively impact your health. It's necessary to review health habits and actively manage your well-being.
reversed.spirituality: You may experience spiritual confusion or stagnation in growth. You might complain about your destiny or reject spiritual teachings. Overcoming inner resistance and adopting a willingness to learn from the current situation is crucial.

upright.keyMeanings: Justice, Balance, Fairness, Truth, Law, Responsibility, Karma/Consequences
upright.general: This card represents fairness, truth, and an association with legal matters. It signifies seeking balance and harmony in all situations, and being ready to accept the consequences of your actions. It suggests a time when objective judgment and a logical approach are needed, and you will find a just resolution. Following your moral compass and choosing the right path is important.
upright.love: Emphasizes balance and fairness in relationships, with honesty and integrity being highlighted. If there have been misunderstandings, it's a good opportunity to reveal the truth and resolve them, correcting any imbalances in the relationship. Decisions regarding marriage or significant relationships may be made, and appropriate rewards will follow for mutual commitment.
upright.career: Signifies professional fairness, ethical decisions, and just rewards for effort. You can expect good results in fields related to justice, such as law, administration, and accounting. Fair and rational decisions will be made in contracts, negotiations, and promotions, and you must complete tasks with a sense of responsibility.
upright.health: Finding balance and harmony in health is important, and you can recover your health through lifestyle improvements. Accurate diagnosis and treatment will occur, and you should not ignore your body's signals but respond rationally. Maintaining mental and physical balance through regular living and stress management is key.
upright.spirituality: Represents a journey to find spiritual balance and inner truth. It's important to reflect on the spiritual consequences of your actions and make ethical choices. Connected to the concept of karma, you will understand the impact of past actions on the present and future.

reversed.keyMeanings: Injustice, Imbalance, Bias, Evasion of Responsibility, Legal Issues, Unreasonableness, Delay
reversed.general: Indicates facing injustice, imbalance, and bias, or that you yourself might exhibit such attitudes. You may experience difficulties due to unreasonable decisions or poor judgment, and there might be a tendency to evade responsibility. There's a risk of getting entangled in legal disputes or unfavorable rulings, and you might react emotionally without seeing the situation objectively. Be cautious, as justice may be delayed or distorted.
reversed.love: Imbalance, injustice, or hidden truths may be revealed in a relationship. There's a high possibility of not being honest with each other, or one partner making too many sacrifices. Misunderstandings and conflicts can deepen, and efforts are needed to restore balance in the relationship.
reversed.career: You may experience injustice, unfair dismissal, discrimination, or unreasonable treatment at work. Be cautious, as you might face difficulties due to contract issues, lawsuits, or financial imbalance. Your efforts or contributions may not be properly recognized, or you could incur losses due to poor judgment.
reversed.health: May indicate health imbalance, misdiagnosis, or delayed treatment. Ignoring your body's signals or failing to correct unhealthy lifestyle habits can worsen problems. You could suffer harm to your health due to unfair medical services or misinformation, so a cautious approach is necessary.
reversed.spirituality: Represents spiritual imbalance, moral confusion, or an attitude of evading responsibility for one's actions. You might ignore inner truths and pursue only worldly gains rather than spiritual growth. Misunderstanding the meaning of karma or lacking reflection on past wrongdoings can hinder spiritual development.

upright.keyMeanings: Sacrifice, New Perspective, Suspension, Patience, Insight, Letting Go
upright.general: This signifies the need to view your current situation from a new perspective. By pausing and adopting a stance of self-sacrifice or surrender, you can gain greater enlightenment and wisdom. This is a voluntary choice, not a forced one, and symbolizes an opportunity to solve problems through unconventional thinking that overturns existing methods.
upright.love: This indicates a need for a new perspective on a relationship, or a willingness to sacrifice for your partner. It's time to pause the relationship and deeply reflect on yourself and your partner. If you embrace a new perspective on romance and let go of old stubbornness, the relationship will mature further.
upright.career: This suggests a need to pause and reconsider your current career direction. You may need to willingly sacrifice immediate gains for a long-term vision or try new approaches. This is a time to step back and observe, or to find a breakthrough through creative ideas that break existing molds.
upright.health: You may need to change daily habits or ways of thinking for your health. It's important to restore balance to your body and mind through rest and meditation rather than strenuous activities. Trying alternative methods beyond conventional treatments may also be beneficial.
upright.spirituality: This is a time for deep introspection and spiritual enlightenment. True spiritual growth can be experienced when you detach from material desires, empty yourself, and let go. Through meditation and self-reflection, you will gain new perspectives and find peace for your soul.

reversed.keyMeanings: Resistance, Refusal to Sacrifice, Stubbornness, Stagnation, Indecision, Unnecessary Sacrifice
reversed.general: This indicates stagnation due to resistance to change or unnecessary stubbornness. You may be failing to solve problems by clinging to old ways and refusing to accept new perspectives. It warns that you might sometimes make futile sacrifices or miss opportunities due to an inability to make important decisions.
reversed.love: You might be unwilling to compromise in a relationship or exhausted by unnecessary sacrifices. By refusing change, the relationship may stagnate, or you might be clinging to a dysfunctional relationship, causing yourself suffering. You need to reflect on your selfishness or your tendency to impose on your partner.
reversed.career: You might be experiencing career stagnation due to refusing new approaches or sacrifices. Unnecessary stubbornness could lead to missing important opportunities or wasting energy on unrewarding tasks. Efforts are needed to face reality and embrace change.
reversed.health: Ignoring health issues or refusing necessary changes could worsen your condition. Irrational beliefs or stubbornness might cause you to miss appropriate treatment times or endure unnecessary suffering. It's time to seriously reflect on your health and follow professional advice.
reversed.spirituality: This indicates avoiding efforts for spiritual growth or refusing deep introspection. You might be overly attached to material things, neglecting your spiritual side. You need to abandon attitudes that keep you trapped in false beliefs or hinder true enlightenment.

upright.keyMeanings: Change, End, New Beginning, Letting Go, Transformation, Transition, Liberation
upright.general: The Death card symbolizes not actual death, but significant change, an ending, and a new beginning resulting from it. It signals that it's time to discard the old and embrace the new, which can often be painful but ultimately brings necessary growth and transformation. It means that you must let go of past ways, relationships, or beliefs to truly move on to the next stage.
upright.love: This foretells a significant change in a relationship. It could mean the end of an old, draining relationship, or indicate that a period of deep transformation has arrived for the relationship to evolve to the next level. It can also mean you are ready to let go of past hurts and embrace new love.
upright.career: You may be facing a significant turning point in your career. It could mean the end of your current job or project and the start of something new, or it's time to make bold changes for better opportunities. Financially, it might be time to cut unnecessary expenses and create a new financial plan.
upright.health: This signifies recovery from a long illness or a break from unhealthy habits. It indicates a need for fundamental changes for your health, such as adopting a new lifestyle or trying entirely new treatments. It might be a time for a detox of body and mind.
upright.spirituality: This represents spiritual awakening or the dismantling of old beliefs. It means letting go of spiritual concepts or fixed ideas that no longer serve you, and moving towards a higher level of consciousness through genuine inner transformation. It is a time of deep reflection and rebirth.

reversed.keyMeanings: Resistance to Change, Stagnation, Procrastination, Clinging to the Past, Delayed Transition, Inability to Let Go
reversed.general: The Death reversed indicates strong resistance to impending change or an attitude of avoiding change. By refusing necessary endings and clinging to the past, you may experience stagnation, or a painful situation might be unnecessarily prolonged. There's a high probability of missing important turning points due to fear of change.
reversed.love: This means lingering on a relationship that should end, or being unable to escape a stagnant relationship. You might be trapped by past hurts or relationship patterns, hindering new love or genuine relationship development. It represents a refusal to accept necessary changes in a relationship.
reversed.career: This indicates stagnation in your current job or situation, despite dissatisfaction, due to fear of change. You might be trapped by familiarity despite better opportunities, or delaying the completion of important projects. Financially, old habits could lead to continued losses.
reversed.health: This means refusing changes for health improvement or trying to maintain unhealthy habits. It warns that ignoring the cause of illness or delaying necessary treatment or lifestyle changes could worsen health problems. Fear of change hinders health recovery.
reversed.spirituality: This indicates refusing changes for spiritual growth or being trapped in an outdated belief system. You might be ignoring your inner voice and avoiding true spiritual enlightenment, bound by past doctrines or customs. Spiritual stagnation and a period of decline could be prolonged.

upright.keyMeanings: Harmony, Balance, Patience, Moderation, Healing, Cooperation
upright.general: This is a time to seek inner and outer harmony, patiently adjusting situations. Everything will flow smoothly when you avoid extremes and practice the virtue of moderation. You can find new paths and grow through fusion and integration.
upright.love: A period of peace and harmony in relationships. Efforts are needed to understand each other's differences, be patient, and make adjustments. If you are single, a balanced relationship may appear; if you are in a relationship, you will come to understand each other more deeply.
upright.career: Cooperation and teamwork are crucial in the workplace. You can achieve good results through harmonious relationships and coordination with colleagues. It's good to adapt flexibly to new projects or roles and move towards goals from a long-term perspective.
upright.health: Physical and mental balance is important. Avoiding excessive stress and engaging in activities that promote body-mind harmony (meditation, yoga, etc.) can be helpful. You may correct imbalances and undergo a healing process.
upright.spirituality: A time to experience inner peace and spiritual growth. You can gain wisdom and achieve spiritual integration through connection with your higher self. You should listen to your inner voice and try to understand the messages of your soul.

reversed.keyMeanings: Imbalance, Discord, Extreme Attitudes, Lack of Patience, Conflict, Non-cooperation
reversed.general: Indicates that imbalance and discord are currently intensifying. Be careful, as hasty decisions or extreme attitudes can worsen the situation. Efforts are needed to resolve internal conflicts or external friction.
reversed.love: Discord and misunderstandings may arise in relationships. It may be difficult to reconcile opinions, or one party may exhibit an extreme attitude. Lack of patience can easily lead to arguments, so efforts in communication and understanding are crucial.
reversed.career: Workplace conflicts with colleagues or difficulties in project progress are anticipated. Teamwork may break down, or conflicts of opinion may become frequent. A lack of coordination skills or insisting on one's own way could lead to losses.
reversed.health: An imbalance in health may occur. Stress or irregular lifestyle habits can strain the body, and emotional fluctuations may become severe. Rest and treatment are needed to restore mental and physical balance.
reversed.spirituality: You may experience inner confusion and a loss of spiritual direction. Your values may become confused, or you may lose interest in spiritual exploration. Efforts are needed to regain your inner center and find peace.

upright.keyMeanings: Addiction, Materialism, Obsession, Temptation, Bondage, Shadow Self, Powerlessness, Unhealthy Attachments, Self-Imprisonment
upright.general: This card often indicates a state of being trapped by material desires, unhealthy attachments, or addictive behaviors. It symbolizes a feeling of powerlessness, being bound by external forces or internal compulsions, and feeling unable to be free. The Devil card encourages us to confront our shadow self and the illusions that hold us captive, recognizing our own contribution to our bondage, thereby finding true freedom.
upright.love: In love, this card can indicate relationships based on obsession, dependency, or manipulative dynamics. It may suggest unhealthy power imbalances, controlling behaviors, or being trapped in a toxic relationship due to fear or material reasons. The Devil card warns against relationships that bind rather than liberate, urging a deep look into the true nature of the connection.
upright.career: In terms of finances and career, this card highlights an unhealthy obsession with money, status, or material gain. It can signify being trapped in a job for financial security, engaging in unethical practices, or succumbing to greed and corruption. The Devil card advises re-evaluating priorities and avoiding situations where integrity is compromised for material wealth.
upright.health: In health, it can suggest addictions (substances, food, unhealthy habits) or ailments stemming from psychological issues manifesting physically. It can also indicate being bound by an illness or condition, or neglecting one's well-being due to excessive indulgence or self-destructive patterns.
upright.spirituality: Spiritually, the Devil card points to an attachment to the material world, neglecting inner growth and fixating on external desires. It can indicate a crisis of faith, feeling spiritually empty, or being led astray from one's true path by worldly temptations. This card challenges you to confront your inner demons and break free from spiritual illusions.

reversed.keyMeanings: Breaking Free, Liberation, Overcoming Addiction, Self-Awareness, Detachment, Revelation, Release from Bondage, Reclaiming Power, Spiritual Awakening
reversed.general: The Devil card in reverse signifies breaking free from self-imposed limitations, addictions, or unhealthy attachments. It represents a moment of revelation where you recognize the chains that bound you and find the strength to release those bonds. This position suggests a journey of reclaiming personal power and liberating yourself from past influences or destructive patterns.
reversed.love: In love, the reversed Devil means recognizing and breaking free from toxic relationships, codependency, or unhealthy dynamics. It can signify setting boundaries, confronting manipulation, or finally finding the courage to leave a detrimental relationship. This card indicates a movement towards healthier and more authentic connections.
reversed.career: In terms of finances and career, it indicates overcoming financial difficulties caused by past excesses or breaking free from a corrupt work environment. It can mean escaping a job that felt like a prison or making a conscious choice to prioritize ethics over pure profit. This reversal points to reclaiming one's financial destiny and finding more fulfilling work.
reversed.health: In health, the reversed Devil signifies overcoming addictions, breaking free from unhealthy habits, or finding a path to healing from chronic conditions. It represents a renewed determination to improve one's well-being and release psychological burdens that have affected physical health.
reversed.spirituality: Spiritually, this card signifies a powerful awakening, shedding illusions, and reconnecting with one's true spiritual path. It represents breaking free from doctrines, false beliefs, or material attachments that hindered spiritual growth. The reversed Devil encourages profound inner transformation and a renewed sense of purpose.

upright.keyMeanings: Collapse, sudden change, shock, liberation, truth, enlightenment
upright.general: The upright Tower card signifies an unexpected, sudden shock or an abrupt collapse. It represents the experience of long-standing structures, beliefs, or relationships crumbling in an instant. However, it is also a process of destroying the unnecessary and false, leading to the discovery of truth and freedom. While initially painful and chaotic, it is ultimately an inevitable process of purification that enables a new beginning on a stronger, more genuine foundation.
upright.love: In love, it indicates a sudden breakup, the shocking revelation of a truth within a relationship, or long-standing issues erupting at once, leading to the dissolution of the relationship. While painful, it can be a crucial turning point to break free from a false relationship and find healthier love.
upright.career: In finances and career, it foretells unpredictable changes such as sudden job loss, business collapse, or a financial crisis. This signifies the shaking of existing stable foundations, but simultaneously, it can be an opportunity to explore new career paths or pursue your true passion.
upright.health: In health, it can indicate a sudden illness, accident, or an unexpected health crisis. It strongly suggests the need for fundamental changes to your existing lifestyle or health habits, which can become a turning point towards a healthier state.
upright.spirituality: Spiritually, it signifies the sudden collapse of old belief systems or spiritual illusions. This can feel like an ego death or a deep spiritual crisis, but ultimately, it becomes a powerful moment of spiritual awakening that leads to deeper truth and enlightenment.

reversed.keyMeanings: Resistance to change, delayed crisis, inner turmoil, inevitable change, gradual change, personal insight
reversed.general: The reversed Tower card indicates a resistance to or avoidance of inevitable change or crisis, even when recognized. Instead of an abrupt external collapse, it may manifest as inner turmoil or personal upheaval, or the impact of change may be softened, occurring gradually. It also warns that the longer you resist change, the longer the suffering may last.
reversed.love: In love, it indicates an awareness of relationship problems but a fear of separation or change, leading to continuous postponement. While it might be an attempt to prevent a catastrophe, covering up issues without fundamental resolution can ultimately lead to greater difficulties.
reversed.career: In finances and career, it signifies a refusal to change, such as staying in an unnecessary job or clinging to poor investment decisions. Instead of a radical collapse, it can lead to gradual financial difficulties or career stagnation, so it's necessary to face the current situation and slowly prepare for change.
reversed.health: In health, it indicates knowing about problems but delaying treatment or refusing to change bad habits. It may signify chronic issues or a gradually worsening health condition rather than an acute illness, and you should embrace change now to prevent a greater crisis.
reversed.spirituality: Spiritually, it signifies being bound by old beliefs or spiritual practices, refusing to accept new truths. You may try to avoid opportunities for inner enlightenment or spiritual awakening, but this ultimately indicates a delay in deeper spiritual growth.

upright.keyMeanings: Hope, healing, inspiration, serenity, positivity, renewal
upright.general: The Star card symbolizes deep hope, spiritual healing, and inner peace. It represents the calm and positive outlook that follows a period of turmoil, assuring you that you are on the right path. It hints at universal blessings and the possibility of your wishes coming true, a time when your wounds heal and new possibilities open up.
upright.love: In love, the Star card signifies healing and rebuilding in a relationship, indicating a time when deep understanding and true love blossom. If single, you can have hope for a new connection; in existing relationships, it's an opportunity to overcome difficulties and form a deeper bond. You can inspire each other and dream of a positive future.
upright.career: In career and finances, the Star card foretells the arrival of creative inspiration and new opportunities. You will adopt a positive attitude and optimistic outlook towards your goals, which is likely to lead to successful outcomes. Financially, it's a period of stability and recovery, where wise investments can yield positive results.
upright.health: In health, the Star card signifies recovery, vitality, and healing through inner peace. Recovery from illness may proceed smoothly, or overall health may improve through psychological stability. A positive mindset will have a beneficial effect on physical health.
upright.spirituality: Spiritually, the Star card symbolizes a deep connection with the universe and inner wisdom. Your intuition will become sharper, and it's a time when you can gain spiritual insights. Through meditation or communion with nature, you can achieve deep serenity and insight, strengthening your faith and hope in your spiritual journey.

reversed.keyMeanings: Despair, distrust, disappointment, powerlessness, pessimism, disconnection
reversed.general: The reversed Star card indicates a loss of hope, feelings of despair, and distrust in reality. This may mean you are caught in frustration and have lost the motivation to move forward. You might be consumed by pessimistic thoughts and anxiety, or feel disconnected from your surroundings and isolated.
reversed.love: In love, the reversed Star card can indicate disappointment, distrust, or emotional disconnection in a relationship. You may lose hope in your partner or find it difficult to believe the relationship will improve. If single, you might lose anticipation for new connections and feel isolated.
reversed.career: In career and finances, the reversed Star card signifies loss of goals, decreased motivation, and unexpected setbacks. You may lose inspiration and be dissatisfied with your current situation, potentially missing new opportunities. Financially, you might experience instability or have a pessimistic view on investments.
reversed.health: In health, the reversed Star card indicates delayed recovery, chronic fatigue, or worsening health due to psychological issues. It may be difficult to recover from illness, or your will to undergo treatment might weaken. Depression or anxiety can negatively affect physical health.
reversed.spirituality: Spiritually, the reversed Star card signifies skepticism about the spiritual path, loss of faith, or disconnection from inner guidance. You may feel isolated and unable to connect with the universe, losing motivation for spiritual growth.

upright.keyMeanings: Illusion, intuition, subconscious, anxiety, unknown, confusion
upright.general: The Moon card symbolizes the deep subconscious, dreams, intuition, and hidden truths. Your current situation may feel unclear and ambiguous, and you might be experiencing confusion between reality and illusion. It's time to listen to your inner voice and explore the unknown through your intuition.
upright.love: In romantic relationships, it indicates the presence of misunderstandings, uncertainty, hidden feelings, or secrets. It might be difficult to discern your partner's true intentions, or you may lack certainty about your own feelings. Honest communication and trusting your intuition are important.
upright.career: In career and finance, there may be much uncertainty in ongoing projects or situations. Information might be lacking, or misunderstandings could arise in relationships with colleagues/superiors. Rather than making hasty judgments, thorough information gathering and a cautious approach are needed.
upright.health: In terms of health, it can indicate mental issues such as stress, anxiety, depression, or sleep disorders. Symptoms might be vague with no clear cause, so it's important to listen to your inner voice and get rest.
upright.spirituality: Spiritually, this is a time to gain deep spiritual insights through dreams, meditation, and intuition. It can be an opportunity to explore the realms of the subconscious and unconscious, confronting your shadow self.

reversed.keyMeanings: Truth revealed, confusion resolved, anxiety overcome, facing reality, clarity, deception exposed
reversed.general: The reversed Moon card signifies a period where long-standing confusion and uncertainty lift, and the truth is revealed. You break free from past fears or illusions, face reality, and gain a clear understanding of the situation. Subconscious issues may surface and be resolved.
reversed.love: In romantic relationships, hidden secrets or misunderstandings may come to light, and the truth will be revealed. Confusion in the relationship will be resolved, and you will understand each other's feelings more clearly. Sometimes, you may need to break free from illusions about the relationship and accept reality.
reversed.career: In career and finance, unclear situations become clear, and misunderstandings or hidden information may be revealed. You will find solutions for projects or situations that caused anxiety, and you will no longer avoid reality but confront it. You may explore new paths.
reversed.health: In terms of health, it indicates finding stability and overcoming anxiety or mental confusion. Symptoms with unknown causes may resolve, or a clear treatment direction may emerge through accurate diagnosis. It's an opportunity for mental health improvement.
reversed.spirituality: Spiritually, you break free from spiritual confusion or a misguided path and find your true spiritual direction. You awaken from distorted intuition or illusions to face higher truths, and you can focus on your true inner voice.

upright.keyMeanings: Joy, success, vitality, happiness, positivity, growth, achievement
upright.general: The Sun card symbolizes pure joy, success, vitality, and optimism. Everything becomes clear, and your efforts come to fruition. You are full of confidence and energy, finding the positive in every situation. It promises clear insights and a bright future.
upright.love: In love, The Sun indicates a happy and harmonious relationship. There is a deep bond, joy, and clear understanding between you. If single, new love may appear or a relationship may develop quickly; existing relationships will become stronger and filled with joy.
upright.career: Professionally, The Sun signifies success and recognition. Your efforts and talents will shine, and projects will be completed successfully. Financially, it's a stable and prosperous period, with high potential for new opportunities or promotions.
upright.health: In terms of health, The Sun symbolizes excellent vitality and healing. It's a time of recovery from illness or abundant overall energy. A positive mindset will have a good impact on physical health, allowing you to maintain an energetic state.
upright.spirituality: Spiritually, The Sun means finding your inner light and realizing your true self. You are filled with self-acceptance and self-love, discovering clear direction and joy on your spiritual journey. It's a time when you feel your soul truly shining.

reversed.keyMeanings: Delay, pessimism, unclarity, temporary unhappiness, overconfidence, disappointment
reversed.general: The reversed Sun can indicate temporary confusion or disappointment. Situations may not proceed as expected, or results may be delayed. You might face difficulties due to a pessimistic attitude or lack of confidence, and sometimes show a tendency to avoid facing reality.
reversed.love: In love, the reversed Sun can signify a lack of clarity in the relationship or temporary unhappiness. Misunderstandings or communication problems may arise, and joy in the relationship might diminish. Sometimes, excessive overconfidence or a self-centered attitude can be the root of the problem.
reversed.career: Professionally, the reversed Sun suggests project delays, results that fall short of expectations, or a lack of recognition. Financial difficulties may arise, or job satisfaction might decrease. Be cautious of overestimating your abilities or ignoring reality.
reversed.health: In terms of health, the reversed Sun can indicate a lack of energy or decreased vitality. Minor illnesses or delayed recovery may occur, and you might feel mentally depressed or fatigued. Efforts to maintain a positive mindset are needed.
reversed.spirituality: Spiritually, the reversed Sun signifies inner darkness or confusion on your spiritual path. You may find it difficult to find your true self or feel lost on your spiritual journey. This is a time when introspection and effort are needed to rediscover your inner light.

upright.keyMeanings: Resurrection, Judgment, Awakening, Evaluation, Forgiveness, New Beginnings, Self-reflection
upright.general: The Judgment card indicates a time of important decisions and changes. It signifies that you are ready to begin a new phase of life, having gained deep insights through evaluating past actions and choices. You may reap the rewards of long-standing efforts or receive significant recognition. Truth will be revealed, and you will experience purification through forgiveness and reconciliation.
upright.love: You may enter a new phase in a relationship or find an opportunity to resolve past issues, misunderstandings, and reconcile. You might meet a soulmate, or an existing relationship could deepen and evolve to a new level. Healing past wounds and reorganizing your relationship will lead to a more mature experience of love.
upright.career: You will reap the rewards of long-standing efforts, complete successful projects, and receive significant recognition. You may experience a promotion, recruitment, or a crucial career turning point, discovering your true calling and talents to open new career doors. It's time to learn from past mistakes and move in a better direction.
upright.health: You may recover from a long-standing illness or find clear diagnoses and effective solutions for health-related issues. It's a good time to abandon unhealthy past habits and start new health management routines. You will regain healing and vitality in both physical and mental health.
upright.spirituality: You will experience deep spiritual awakening and listen to your inner voice. You will clear past karma, release guilt, and experience a spiritual rebirth. You will gain deep insights into life's purpose and reason for existence, discover your true self, and reach a significant turning point in spiritual growth.

reversed.keyMeanings: Self-doubt, Delay, Regret, Poor Judgment, Criticism, Avoidance, Procrastination
reversed.general: The Judgment card in reverse indicates a situation where you are delaying important decisions or are stuck in past mistakes, unable to move forward. You might be overly critical of yourself or too concerned with others' criticism to act. There's a risk of missing important opportunities or making poor judgments, and a tendency to ignore the truth may emerge.
reversed.love: You may avoid resolving relationship issues or be stuck in past wounds and regrets, unable to move forward. Reconciliation might be difficult, or distrust and misunderstandings in the relationship could deepen. There may be a tendency to ignore the true nature of the relationship or evade responsibility for important decisions.
reversed.career: You might miss promotion opportunities, or projects could be delayed or fail. You may wander due to poor investment decisions or job dissatisfaction. There's a tendency to evade your responsibilities or duties, potentially losing important opportunities or confidence in your career calling.
reversed.health: Diagnosis of an illness might be delayed, or you may distrust treatment methods for health issues. Past health problems could recur, or your condition might worsen due to neglect of health management. Psychological stress or guilt could negatively impact your health.
reversed.spirituality: You may experience spiritual confusion and a feeling of being lost. You might ignore your inner voice and be trapped by past guilt or negative energy. Spiritual growth could stagnate, or you might lose conviction about life's purpose and wander aimlessly.

upright.keyMeanings: Completion, Achievement, Integration, Satisfaction, Success, Conclusion, Travel
upright.general: The World card, the final card of the Major Arcana, symbolizes the complete culmination, achievement, and integration of a cycle. It means you have reached your goals and reaped the rewards of your efforts, feeling deep satisfaction and fulfillment. It indicates that overall harmony and balance have been achieved in your life, reaching an optimal state.
upright.love: In romantic relationships, it signifies deep connection and complete satisfaction, hinting at meeting a soulmate or a relationship evolving to a new dimension. There's a high probability of marriage or the culmination of a long-term relationship, and you will feel great happiness and stability on your journey with your partner. It's a time of deep integration and perfect harmony with each other.
upright.career: In your career, it indicates that you will finally achieve great success and accomplishment after long efforts. You will reach your goals, successfully complete projects, and gain honor and rewards accordingly. International opportunities may open up, or you might succeed in a global environment, enjoying financial stability and abundance.
upright.health: In terms of health, it signifies maintaining an excellent overall state, a time of recovery from illness, or regaining vitality and balance. Both physical and mental health will be in harmony, allowing you to enjoy peak condition. Positive results from healthy lifestyle habits will manifest.
upright.spirituality: It signifies the completion stage of your spiritual journey, where you will experience self-realization and cosmic integration. You will gain spiritual wisdom, feel inner peace and fulfillment, and reach a deep understanding of the meaning of existence. It's an elevated period where spiritual goals are achieved, and you fully feel your connection to the universe.

reversed.keyMeanings: Incompletion, Delay, Stagnation, Dissatisfaction, Frustration, Limitation, Obstruction
reversed.general: When The World card appears in reverse, it signifies delays in achieving goals or that some parts are not yet complete. You might feel something is lacking or incomplete, and obstacles or hindrances may arise in moving towards your goals. It indicates that you have not yet experienced complete satisfaction or conclusion.
reversed.love: In romantic relationships, you might feel stagnation, lack of progress, or incompleteness. The relationship may be delayed from moving to the next stage, or there might be difficulties in harmony with your partner. It suggests that unresolved issues remain in the relationship, preventing you from feeling complete satisfaction.
reversed.career: In your career, it means projects are incomplete or you are struggling to achieve your goals. Promotion or success may be delayed, or you might not feel job satisfaction. You could be experiencing a period of career stagnation or find yourself in a situation where you cannot fully utilize your potential.
reversed.health: In terms of health, it indicates delayed recovery or persistent minor health issues. You might lack vitality or feel easily fatigued, experiencing discomfort due to an imbalance in your body. It's also possible that you've neglected health management or that unresolved health problems still exist.
reversed.spirituality: You might feel stagnant or lost on your spiritual journey. There could be a lack of spiritual enlightenment, or it might be a difficult time to find inner peace. You might feel a weakened connection to the universe or resistance to spiritual growth.

upright.keyMeanings: New beginnings, love, joy, happiness, spiritual awakening, healing
upright.general: The Ace of Cups symbolizes new emotional beginnings, love, joy, and spiritual awakening. It indicates a time of overflowing emotional fulfillment and abundance. It suggests experiencing new relationships, new opportunities, or inner peace and happiness. Your heart is open, and positive energy is flowing.
upright.love: Signifies the beginning of a new love, deep emotional connection, and healing and reconciliation in relationships. If single, you may meet a new partner; in existing relationships, it can evolve into a deeper, more satisfying stage. Unconditional love and happiness abound, and you will feel a deep bond with each other.
upright.career: Represents new career opportunities, the start of creative projects, positive relationship building at work, and satisfaction and passion for your tasks. You can achieve good results by following your instincts and intuition. Financial abundance may also follow, and you will receive new inspiration for your work.
upright.health: Indicates emotional healing, stress relief, and mental stability and peace. It's a time to find balance between body and mind and recover from emotional issues. A positive mindset greatly aids health improvement, and inner peace leads to physical vitality.
upright.spirituality: Means spiritual awakening, development of intuition, and connection with inner wisdom. Through spiritual practices like meditation and mindfulness, you can achieve deep peace and enlightenment. You may feel a connection to the universe, deep compassion and love, and a new spiritual journey may begin.

reversed.keyMeanings: Emotional blockage, repressed emotions, disappointment, sadness, emotional emptiness, relationship issues, creative stagnation
reversed.general: The Ace of Cups reversed indicates emotional blockage, repressed emotions, or disappointment and sadness. You may struggle with emotional expression or feel an inner emptiness. It suggests that emotional imbalance and confusion may arise, and you might be ignoring your true feelings.
reversed.love: Signifies misunderstandings in relationships, emotional distance, disappointment or hurt in love. It may be difficult to express emotions, or communication problems may arise with your partner. It's a time when relationships may stagnate or you might feel dissatisfaction, and you may not be ready to accept new love.
reversed.career: Indicates creative stagnation, loss of passion for work, workplace discord, or unsatisfactory situations. You might miss new opportunities or experience decreased work efficiency due to emotional issues. There's a tendency to ignore your intuition and settle for the status quo, potentially losing inspiration.
reversed.health: Physical symptoms due to emotional stress, depression, anxiety, and severe mood swings may occur. Inability to properly release emotions can negatively affect both body and mind.
